special_mechanics.name: Superhuman Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Players can jump extremely high and make slam dunks that defy both human capabilities and the laws of physics

special_mechanics.name: On Fire Mode
special_mechanics.description: If a player makes three baskets in a row, character becomes 'on fire' with unlimited turbo and increased shooting precision. Continues until other team scores or player scores four additional consecutive baskets while on fire

special_mechanics.name: Super Clean Floors (Easter Egg)
special_mechanics.description: Activated by pressing A five times and right five times on Genesis controller. Causes characters to fall if they run too fast or change direction too quickly

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - Source provides gameplay descriptions and mechanics documentation but no quantitative physics parameters. Specific movement values, gravity constants, and sub-pixel system details are not documented in available Wikipedia source
